description_long: This rifle features a classic design with a black metal receiver and barrel, complemented by a skeletonized metal stock at the rear. The handguard and pistol grip are both black, likely made from polymer or coated metal, providing a modern tactical appearance. The magazine is curved and detachable, typical of rifles designed for rapid reloading and high-capacity use. The barrel is long and slender, ending with a simple muzzle, and the rifle is equipped with basic iron sights for aiming. The overall construction suggests durability and functionality, suitable for urban environments. The combination of matte black and metallic finishes gives it a utilitarian, robust look.
description: A black and metallic rifle with a skeletonized stock, curved detachable magazine, and iron sights, designed for durability and tactical use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the narrow profile of the barrel and the skeletonized stock.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved magazine, pistol grip, and full length of the skeletonized stock.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the end of the skeletonized stock and the alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the magazine, handguard, and overall rifle profile.
